title: Fix reversed T-Echo GNSS UART pins
description: Research under project-LICHEN-2nnd.5.2 found that the LICHEN T-Echo Zephyr pinctrl assigns MCU UART TX=P1.09 and RX=P1.08, while LilyGO's official code calls SerialGPS.setPins(RX=P1.09, TX=P1.08) and module-level evidence maps L76K TXD to MCU P1.09 and L76K RXD to MCU P1.08. Verify against the official schematic and physical board, correct devicetree pinctrl/comments if confirmed, and validate NMEA receive plus command transmit.
acceptance_criteria: Pinned official schematic and source evidence establish signal direction; T-Echo UART1 devicetree uses MCU RX on the GNSS module TX net and MCU TX on the GNSS module RX net; native_sim/devicetree checks and a physical NMEA/command-response smoke test pass; three independent code reviews complete before closure.
